label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user is asking which of the options leads to getting fat according to the passage. The passage is about healthy lifestyle tips. I need to look for the part where it talks about causes of getting fat. The first tip is about keeping a scientific diet. The passage says, "Over intake of sugar is one of the main reasons for getting fat. Over intake of protein or fat and low intake of fiber can also lead to getting fat." So here, overconsumption of sugar, protein, or fat, and low fiber intake are mentioned as causes. Looking at the options: (A) low protein intake. The passage doesn't say low protein causes fatness; it actually mentions needing only a little protein each day. (B) low intake
